operations.title: Dead by Daylight 10th Anniversary Recap: Announcements & Celebrations
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: Dead by Daylight’s 10th Anniversary recap collects the broadcast reveals, anniversary beats, and future roadmap highlights in one official summary.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight’s Anniversary Party Is Almost Here
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The official event post previews the 10th Anniversary Party schedule, meet-and-greets, broadcast beat, and on-site celebration plan.

operations.title: Jason Has Finally Come To Dead by Daylight
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The official news post announces Jason entering The Fog, framing the chapter reveal as the long-awaited tenth anniversary headline beat.

operations.title: The Entity Unveiled: A Guide To Dead by Daylight’s Eldritch Horror
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: This lore feature explains The Entity and keeps the brand conversation tied to DBD’s core supernatural mythology.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight Celebrates 10 Years In The Fog
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The 10-year retrospective looks back on the roster, major milestones, and long-term brand growth heading into the anniversary window.

operations.title: Dead by Daylight & Darkest Dungeon Delve Into Ruin
operations.author: Dead by Daylight
operations.contents: The Ruin Rift collaboration links Darkest Dungeon cosmetics and progression beats into DBD’s ongoing live-ops schedule.

store.name: 黎明杀机
store.short_description: 10年恐惧相伴。10年的惊吓与刺激体验。10年的残暴献祭与惊险逃脱。 永久困于邪恶的幻境之中，即使死亡也无法逃脱，这是一场需要勇气和智慧的较量，四名意志坚定的逃生者在残忍对局中面对嗜血杀手。选择一方，进入多人非对称竞技游戏世界，获得最佳恐怖游戏体验。
store.short_description_en: 10 years of horror. 10 years of jump scares and close calls. 10 years of brutal sacrifices and thrilling escapes. Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits.
